retry_reason: If lookup_extent_mapping returns NULL, the requested mapping does not exist; retrying with same parameters will not change the result.
contract_summary: A get-wrapper that calls lookup_extent_mapping to find an extent_map covering the given range [start, start+len). On success, the returned extent_map has its reference count incremented, transferring ownership to the caller. The caller must ensure that a corresponding release is called via free_extent_map() when done. If no matching extent is found, NULL is returned and no reference is acquired. The function itself does not perform any additional logic or error handling.
